jobs.title: Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.

• With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.

• Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.

• Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.

• Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.

• Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area. | This is you:
• Completed training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.

• Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.

• Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.

• Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.

• Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.

• Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. Le persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: ## Mansioni - Versare i nostri ospiti con trattamenti termali professionali come massaggi sportivi, massaggi firma, scrub corpo, avvolge e bagni. - Con il vostro senso per le esigenze individuali, si consiglia ai nostri ospiti sui servizi spa e prodotti per la cura della pelle di alta qualità. - Fornire esperienze di benessere indimenticabili attraverso la cura di prima classe e il servizio attento. - Sostenere il team spa alla reception con la pianificazione degli appuntamenti, assicurando operazioni fluide. - Utilizzare il tuo flair di vendita per consigliare i prodotti di assistenza domestica adatti, aumentando le entrate termiche. - Assicurare i più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza in tutta la zona spa e fitness. #
• Requisiti # - Allenamento completo come massaggiatore o una qualifica paragonabile nel campo spa e benessere. - Ulteriori certificazioni (ad esempio, massaggio tailandese, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, riflessologia, drenaggio linfatico) sono un vantaggio. - Idealmente, esperienza in corsi di fitness come yoga o Pilates. - Esperienza dimostrata nel settore spa, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso. - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione in tedesco e inglese e sensibilità ai desideri dei nostri ospiti. - Flessibilità di lavorare fine settimana, vacanze e eventi speciali come la nostra Spa Notte. # Cosa # - Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.
• Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Spa-Therapeut (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Arbeitszeit: 100%. Vertrag: 10-monatige Stelle / 10-month contract. Eintritt: 2026-06-01. Menschen auf 1800 Metern über dem Meeresspiegel gestalten das Luxus-Mountain-Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen intelligentes Luxus für ein unvergessliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxus Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so umarmen wir unsere Kultur: unterschwelliger Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer prägenden Kultur zu werden: ##
• Aufgaben - Verköstigen Sie unsere Gäste mit professionellen Spa-Behandlungen wie Sportmassagen, Signaturmassagen, Körper-Scrubs, Wraps und Bädern. - Mit Ihrem Gespür für individuelle Bedürfnisse beraten Sie unsere Gäste zu Spa-Diensten und hochwertigen Hautpflegeprodukten. - Bereiten Sie unvergessliche Wohlfühl-Erlebnisse durch erstklassige Pflege und aufmerksamen Service. - Unterstützen Sie das Spa-Team an der Rezeption bei der Terminplanung, um einen reibungslosen Betrieb zu gewährleisten. - Nutzen Sie Ihr Verkaufstalent, um geeignete Home-Care-Produkte zu empfehlen und den Spa-Umsatz zu steigern. - Stellen Sie die höchsten Hygiene- und Sicherheitsstandards im Spa- und Fitnessbereich sicher. ##
• Anforderungen - Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Massagetrainer oder vergleichbare Qualifikation im Bereich Spa und Wellness. - Zusätzliche Zertifizierungen (z. B. Thai-Massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, Reflexologie, Lymphdrainage) sind ein Vorteil. - Idealweise Erfahrung in Fitness-Kursen wie Yoga oder Pilates. - Nachweisliche Erfahrung im Spa-Bereich, bevorzugt in Luxus-Hotellerie. - Exzellente Kommunikation in Deutsch und Englisch und Empathie für die Wünsche unserer Gäste. - Flexibilität, um an Wochenenden, Feiertagen und besonderen Veranstaltungen wie unserer Night Spa zu arbeiten. ##
• Was wir bieten - Bei Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. -
• Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiter-Restaurant und zahlreiche Vorteile.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Therapist Spa (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hôtel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / Contrat de 10 mois. - Oui. Les gens à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : Les hommes - Pampler nos clients avec des soins de spa professionnels tels que des massages sportifs, des massages signature, des gommages corporels, des enveloppes et des bains. - Avec votre sens des besoins individuels, vous conseillerez nos clients sur les services de spa et les produits de soins de haute qualité. - Offrir des expériences de bien-être inoubliables grâce à des soins de première classe et un service attentif. - Soutenir l'équipe de spa à la réception avec la planification des rendez-vous, en assurant le bon fonctionnement. - Utilisez votre style de vente pour recommander des produits de soins à domicile appropriés, augmentant ainsi les revenus du spa. - Assurer les normes d'hygiène et de sécurité les plus élevées dans l'espace spa et fitness. ##
• Requisiti - A complété la formation en massothérapie ou une qualification comparable dans le domaine du spa et du bien-être. - Des certifications supplémentaires (p. ex. massage thaïlandais, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, réflexologie, drainage lymphatique) sont un avantage. - Idéalement, l'expérience dans les cours de fitness comme le yoga ou Pilates. - Expérience éprouvée dans le secteur des spas, de préférence dans l'hôtellerie de luxe. - Excellentes compétences en communication en allemand et en anglais et une sensibilité aux souhaits de nos invités. - Flexibilité au travail week-ends, vacances et événements spéciaux comme notre Night Spa.
• Cosa offriamo - Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès.
• Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Reservations Agent (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Reservations Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail

• Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty

• Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner

• Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email

• Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings

• Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products | This is you:
• Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests

• Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment

• Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations

• Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage

• Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels

• Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

titleByLocale.it: Assistente alla piscina/ Guardia di Vita (m/w/d)

jobs.description:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• Creating Perfect Pool Moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna areas, keeping a keen eye on every detail.

• A Heartfelt Host: You welcome our guests with a smile and provide attentive service throughout the entire SPA and pool area.

• Hygiene at the Highest Level: You guarantee cleanliness and order across the SPA and perform daily quality controls.

• Crafting Moments of Well-being: With your additional qualifications in sauna infusions (Aufgüsse), aqua gym, and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to the relaxation experience and the joy of being in the water. | This is you:
• Professional Qualification: Completed vocational training as a Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), or an equivalent qualification.

• Relevant Experience: Proven experience in pool operations and water supervision, as well as in conducting sauna infusions and swimming lessons.

• Certifications: Ideally, you hold the Brevet Plus Pool (SLRG) and have sound knowledge of First Aid and BLS-AED.

• Language Skills: Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.

• Personality: An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of safety, service, and hospitality. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Le persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua occasione per essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: | Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi:
• Creare momenti perfetti per la piscina: assicurate operazioni fluide nelle aree piscina e sauna, tenendo d'occhio ogni dettaglio.

• A Heartfelt Host: accogliete i nostri ospiti con un sorriso e fornite un servizio attento in tutta la zona SPA e piscina.

• Igiene al livello più alto: Garantisci pulizia e ordine attraverso la SPA ed esegue controlli di qualità giornalieri.

• Crafting Moments of Well-being: Con le tue qualifiche aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna (Aufgüsse), palestra aqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più piccoli, contribuisci attivamente all'esperienza di relax e alla gioia di essere in acqua. # Questo sei tu:
• Qualifica professionale: Formazione professionale completa come Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), o una qualifica equivalente.

• Esperienza Rilevante: Esperienza comprovata nelle operazioni in piscina e supervisione dell'acqua, oltre a condurre infusioni di sauna e lezioni di nuoto.

• Certificazioni: Idealmente, si tiene la piscina Brevet Plus (SLRG) e hanno una solida conoscenza di First Aid e BLS-AED.

• Competenze linguistiche: ottime competenze in tedesco e inglese; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio.

• Personalità: Una personalità attenta e calda con un forte senso di sicurezza, servizio e ospitalità. A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.

## Descrizione
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• Creating Perfect Pool Moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna areas, keeping a keen eye on every detail.

• A Heartfelt Host: You welcome our guests with a smile and provide attentive service throughout the entire SPA and pool area.

• Hygiene at the Highest Level: You guarantee cleanliness and order across the SPA and perform daily quality controls.

• Crafting Moments of Well-being: With your additional qualifications in sauna infusions (Aufgüsse), aqua gym, and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to the relaxation experience and the joy of being in the water. | This is you:
• Professional Qualification: Completed vocational training as a Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), or an equivalent qualification.

• Relevant Experience: Proven experience in pool operations and water supervision, as well as in conducting sauna infusions and swimming lessons.

• Certifications: Ideally, you hold the Brevet Plus Pool (SLRG) and have sound knowledge of First Aid and BLS-AED.

• Language Skills: Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.

• Personality: An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of safety, service, and hospitality. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Die Menschen auf 1800m über dem Meeresspiegel prägen den Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche nehmen wir unsere Kultur an: unterschätzter Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam schaffen wir es. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Mitglied unserer formgebenden Kultur zu sein: | Dies ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen:
• Erstellen von Perfect Pool Moments: Sie sorgen für reibungslose Operationen im Pool- und Saunabereich und halten ein Auge auf jedes Detail.

• Ein Heartfelt Host: Sie begrüßen unsere Gäste mit einem Lächeln und bieten aufmerksamen Service im gesamten SPA- und Poolbereich.

• Hygiene auf höchstem Niveau: Sie garantieren Sauberkeit und Bestellung im gesamten SPA und führen tägliche Qualitätskontrollen durch.

• Crafting Moments of Well-being: Mit Ihren zusätzlichen Qualifikationen in Sauna-Infusionen (Aufgüsse), Aqua-Fitness und Schwimmunterricht für unsere jüngeren Gäste tragen Sie aktiv zum Entspannungserlebnis und zur Freude des Seins im Wasser bei. | Hier bist du:
• Berufsqualifikation: Abschluss der Berufsbildung als Lifeguard, Spezialist für Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe) oder gleichwertige Qualifikation.

• Relevante Erfahrung: Bewährte Erfahrung in Poolbetrieben und Wasserüberwachung sowie bei der Durchführung von Saunainfusionen und Schwimmunterricht.

• Zertifizierungen: Im Idealfall halten Sie den Brevet Plus Pool (SLRG) und haben fundierte Kenntnisse über First Aid und BLS-AED.

• Sprachkenntnisse: Ausgezeichnete deutsche und englische Fähigkeiten; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Vorteil.

• Persönlichkeit: Eine aufmerksame, warme Persönlichkeit mit einem starken Gefühl von Sicherheit, Service und Gastfreundschaft. Vorteile: Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke.

Descrizione

En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. • Personnalité : Une personnalité attentive et chaleureuse avec un fort sentiment de sécurité, de service et d'hospitalité. Avantages: Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
jobs.description:

Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family. Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories. Why Kulm Group?

• You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.

• You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.

• You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.

• You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.

• You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development. | This is you:
• A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.

• Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.

• Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.

• Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.

• Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.

• Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application! | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

Eleva la tua carriera a nuove altezze a 1800 metri sul livello del mare e diventare parte della famiglia Kulm Group. Sei pronto a ridefinire l'esperienza di viaggio di montagna di lusso? Unisciti al nostro team dinamico e internazionale di Kulm Group, dove insieme forniamo ai nostri ospiti un'esperienza di lusso unica e creiamo ricordi indimenticabili. Perché Kulm Group?
• Pursuit of Excellence: L'eccellenza è al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. Ci sforziamo ogni giorno per raggiungere il meglio e deliziare i nostri ospiti e dipendenti.
• Team Passionato: Lavorare in un team vivace e internazionale che si sostiene e si ispira. Esperienza vera camaraderie e spirito di squadra con noi.
• Opportunità di carriera: Sbloccare il vostro potenziale e crescere con noi. Siamo impegnati nel vostro sviluppo personale e professionale.
• Cultura unica: immergetevi in un ambiente di lavoro che valorizza creatività, passione e autenticità. Qui, è possibile portare le vostre idee alla vita e fare un impatto reale. Fate parte di qualcosa di straordinario!

Mansioni
• Gestisci con fiducia la tua sezione, garantendo un servizio senza interruzioni con un sorriso e un'attenzione ai dettagli.
• Coordinate il vostro team, delegate i compiti e garantite un'esecuzione impeccabile.
• Sei un vero ospite a cuore, consigliando ai nostri ospiti internazionali su menu e abbinamenti di vino.
• Si occupano di compiti amministrativi come la pianificazione a turni e la gestione degli ordini con efficienza e struttura.
• Introduce idee fresche e crea esperienze innovative che lasciano un'impressione duratura.
• Condividi la tua esperienza con il tuo team, promuovendo continuamente formazione e sviluppo.

Requisiti
• Una formazione completa nella ristorazione e nell'esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso o nella gastronomia di fascia alta.
• Esperienza di leadership e la capacità di motivare e ispirare il vostro team all'eccellenza.
• Competenze di comunicazione e entusiasmo eccezionali per lavorare con una clientela internazionale.
• Forte capacità organizzative, un elevato senso di qualità e un'unità per fissare nuovi standard.
• Flessibilità, resilienza e passione per il servizio eccezionale.
• La fluidità in tedesco e in inglese è essenziale; lingue aggiuntive sono un plus.

Cosa?
Impostare nuovi standard nella cena fine e diventare parte del nostro team. Attendiamo con ansia la vostra applicazione!
Vantaggi: Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.

Stellenantritt: 2026-06-09. Le persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua occasione per essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: ## Mansioni - Fornire trattamenti facciali di alta qualità, manicure e pedicure (compreso lo smalto di colore gel con OPI) a livello svizzero deluxe. - Esecuzione di massaggi classici e firmati - idealmente compreso Lomi Lomi, thailandese o pietra calda. - Aiutare a creare un'esperienza termale indimenticabile: fornire consigli personali ai nostri ospiti, vendendo attivamente prodotti e trattamenti esclusivi. - Sostenere il responsabile della spa in compiti amministrativi, coordinamento del team e operazioni quotidiane - Assistere con garanzia di qualità e controllo dell'ordine e dell'igiene in tutte le aree spa, piscina e fitness - Rappresentando il nostro concetto di spa con un'accoglienza calda e un senso di stile - sempre con un sorriso ##
• Requisiti - Allenamento completo come beauticista e massaggiatrice e almeno 2 anni di esperienza professionale in un ambiente termale di fascia alta. - No. Ottima conoscenza di manicure/pedicure, massaggi e trattamenti di bellezza – tra cui un lavoro sicuro con prodotti e tecniche di alta qualità. - mentalità ospitante con un senso di estetica, discrezione e eccellente comprensione del servizio. - Tedesco fluido e molto buone competenze in inglese – tutte le lingue aggiuntive sono un plus. - Capacità organizzative, talento di vendita e il piacere di lavorare in un hotel di lusso a 5 stelle superior. # Cosa# offrendo - A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.
• Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.

Stellenantritt: 2026-06-09. People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. • Providing high-quality facials, manicures and pedicures (including gel colour polish with OPI) at Swiss deluxe level.
• Performing classic and signature massages – ideally including Lomi Lomi, Thai or hot stone.
• Helping to create an unforgettable spa experience: providing personal advice to our guests, actively selling exclusive products and treatments.
• Supporting the spa manager in administrative tasks, team coordination and daily operations

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Luxury Spa Supervisor (m/m/j) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / Contrat de 10 mois. - Oui. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-09. Les gens à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : ## Mansioni - Fournir des visages, des manucures et des pédicures de haute qualité (y compris le vernis à gel avec OPI) au niveau de luxe suisse. - Exécuter des massages classiques et signature – idéalement y compris Lomi Lomi, Thaï ou pierre chaude. - Aider à créer une expérience de spa inoubliable: fournir des conseils personnels à nos clients, vendre activement des produits et des traitements exclusifs. - Accompagner le responsable des spas dans les tâches administratives, la coordination de l'équipe et les opérations quotidiennes - Assister à l'assurance qualité et au contrôle de l'ordre et de l'hygiène dans les zones de spa, piscine et fitness - Représenter notre concept de spa avec un accueil chaleureux et un sens du style – toujours avec un sourire ##
• Requisiti - Terminé la formation comme esthéticienne et masseuse et au moins 2 ans d'expérience professionnelle dans un environnement spa haut de gamme. - Oui. Très bonne connaissance des manucures/pédicures, massages et soins de beauté – y compris un travail confiant avec des produits et des techniques de haute qualité. - La mentalité d'accueil avec un sens de l'esthétique, la discrétion et une excellente compréhension du service. - L'allemand et de très bonnes compétences en anglais – toutes les langues supplémentaires sont un plus. - Compétences organisationnelles, talents de vente et plaisir de travailler dans un hôtel de luxe de niveau supérieur 5 étoiles. ##
• Cosa offriamo - Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès.
• Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Laundry Employee (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Laundry Employee (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• Unloading and loading linen from the appropriate machines (washing machines and dryers)

• Sorting dirty linen coming from both hotels

• Working with heavy-loading machines

• Folding linen

• Preparing and storing clean linen according to the standards expected of a 5* luxury hotel

• Transporting clean and soiled linen to the Grand Hotel Kronenhof by bus (driving licence, category B required)

• Organisation and cleaning of the department | This is you:
• Resilience and strong

• Basic knowledge of lingerie/laundry

• Precision and attention to detail

• Must have: Italian and/or English

• Nice to have: other languages

• Must-Have: Drivers license | Benefits: At the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine. With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.

jobs.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:
• Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.

• Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”

• Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”

• Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.

• Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”

• Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.

• Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.

• Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). | This is you:
• Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.

• Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.

• IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).

• Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.

• Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung! ##
• Wir bieten - Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herz unseres Erfolgs. -

Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inégalée. En tant que membre du Luxury Kulm Group, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Nous avons hâte de recevoir votre candidature ! ## Ce que nous offrons - Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre succès. -

jobs.title: Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-08-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• You are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.

• You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.

• You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.

• You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.

• You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.

• You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.
Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. | This is you:
• Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.

• Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.

• Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.

• Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.

• Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • Pensi in termini di occupazione e opportunità: Si mantiene il nostro piano di prenotazioni accurato e aggiornato, contribuendo attivamente all'utilizzo ottimale del nostro inventario camera.

• In stretta collaborazione con Executive Assistant Manager e Front Office Manager, si sviluppano previsioni e report essenziali per la pianificazione quotidiana.

• Sei meticoloso con i dati: i profili degli ospiti e i database sono mantenuti con cura e discrezione – struttura e conformità fanno parte del tuo DNA.

• Rimanete in vista della curva: dalla gestione del sistema Channel Manager alla raffinazione continua dei nostri standard ISO e RIMS, assicurate operazioni fluide e portate nuove idee al tavolo.

• Si trasforma il potenziale in prestazioni: Upselling è più di un compito per voi – è un modo per migliorare il viaggio degli ospiti e creare valore aggiunto significativo.

Perché unirsi a noi? Perché farai parte di uno degli hotel più rinomati della Svizzera – un luogo dove non lavori, ti aiuti a plasmare il futuro. • competenze linguistiche: si parla e si scrive fluentemente in tedesco e in inglese; conoscenza aggiuntiva del francese o dell'italiano è un plus.

• Composure e chiarezza: sia sotto pressione che in comunicazione diretta degli ospiti, si rimane professionali, efficienti e caldi.

• Guida e orientamento alla crescita: non si desidera solo soddisfare le aspettative, ma migliorare i processi e investire nel proprio sviluppo. A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.

• You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.

• You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.

Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. | This is you:

• Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.

• Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.

• Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.

• Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.

• Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
Directeur adjoint des réservations (m/w/d) - Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hôtel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-08-01.

Les gens à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de façonnage : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous :

• Vous êtes la voix de notre hôtel: Que ce soit par téléphone ou par courriel, vous créez des offres convaincantes, confirmez les réservations et assurez-vous que les suivis sont traités avec précision – le tout conforme aux normes LHW et ISO.

• Vous pensez en termes d'occupation et d'opportunité: Vous gardez notre plan de réservation précis et à jour, contribuant activement à l'utilisation optimale de notre inventaire de chambre.

• Vous mettez les chiffres à jour : En étroite collaboration avec le directeur exécutif adjoint et le directeur de la réception, vous élaborez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels à la planification quotidienne.

• Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données : les profils des invités et les bases de données sont maintenus avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN.

• Vous restez en avance sur la courbe : de la gestion du système Channel Manager à l'affinage continu de nos normes ISO et RIMS, vous assurez un bon fonctionnement et apportez de nouvelles idées à la table.

• Vous transformez le potentiel en performance : la vente est plus qu'une tâche pour vous – c'est un moyen d'améliorer le voyage des invités et de créer une valeur ajoutée significative.

Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Parce que vous allez faire partie de l'un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un endroit où vous ne travaillez pas seulement, vous aidez à façonner l'avenir. Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et vivrez une culture d'équipe définie par l'élégance, l'authenticité et la collaboration. Autres C'est vous :

• Expérience professionnelle : vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle en hospitalité ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement dans l'hôtellerie de luxe – et vous offre plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente.

• L'état d'esprit des ventes: Vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment élever l'expérience des clients à travers les ventes stratégiques de chambres.

• Compétences linguistiques: Vous parlez et écrivez couramment en allemand et en anglais; la connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus.

• Composure & clarté: Que ce soit sous pression ou en communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux.

• Orientation vers le moteur et la croissance : Vous êtes désireux non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais aussi d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. Avantages: Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Assistant Front Office Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Assistant Front Office Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us:
• Leadership & Partnership: You confidently represent the Front Office Manager and work together to ensure seamless operations at the highest level.

• The Guest Journey: From a warm welcome to a smooth check-out, you ensure our guests' stay is truly unforgettable.

• Knowledge Sharing: You contribute your expertise through staff training and performance reviews, while maintaining clear and professional communication with all other departments.

• Point of Contact: You serve as the primary contact for our guests—competent, proactive, and solution-oriented at all times.

• Administrative Excellence: You are responsible for statistics and month-end closings, ensuring strict adherence to LHW, Forbes, and Kulm standards.

• Guest Experience: With your profound knowledge of the hotel and the local region, you inspire our guests and guarantee a unique, world-class experience. | This is you:
• Education & Experience: You hold a degree in hospitality or business, with at least 3 years of experience in the 5-star luxury hotel segment.

• Leadership Skills: You possess proven leadership experience and a genuine passion for delivering exceptional service.

• Personality: You have a sophisticated appearance, a true host’s heart, and find joy in personal guest interaction.

• Languages: Must-have: Native or bilingual fluency in German and excellent English. Additional languages are a distinct advantage.

• Start Date: Available from June; we offer both 10-month seasonal or permanent year-round positions. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
